_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to enumerate network shares and identify ACLs/security permissions and analyze for vulnerabilities/misconfigurations (e.g. SMB, NFS, ISCSI).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.495), SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.450).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.515). Shared vocabulary: [network, security]. DCWF-only terms [ability, acls, analyze, enumerate, identify, iscsi] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, controls, data, encryption, identity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.844, R=0.870). R exceeds P by 0.025 — the WIDAI KSA's 22 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 17 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to enumerate network shares and identify ACLs/security permissions and a" and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.497 ≈ STS 0.515 (gap 0.017). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [network, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [network, security]. DCWF-only: [ability, acls, analyze, enumerate, identify, iscsi]. WIDAI-only: [access, audit, controls, data, encryption, identity].
